prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU software for the EA888 Gen 3B (DKG code) 2.0L TSI engine, targeting 350 HP and 369 lb-ft on 93 octane with a custom APR Carbonio intake system and APR Catted Downpipe (1.5" primary, 2.5" secondary) paired with a Garrett GT2867RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor inducer) and upgraded BorgWarner K04-0644 fuel injectors (1,300cc/min) for precise AFR control under sustained boost (22 psi peak, tapering to 18 psi)

Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers with custom valving for the MQB platform (1.8" front drop, 1.6" rear drop) and H&R 24mm front / 22mm rear anti-roll bars (adjustable end links) to eliminate body roll during high-G cornering, paired with OEM VW Performance polybushings (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms) to sharpen chassis response without NVH compromise

Wagner Tuning Competition Intercooler (FMIC) with a 600x300x76mm core (50% larger than OEM) and integrated water-methanol injection (AEM 340lph pump, Snow Performance Stage 3 nozzle) to maintain intake temps below 45°C at 22 psi boost, supported by a custom 3" aluminum charge pipe setup (V-band clamps) and a 034 Motorsport billet aluminum throttle body spacer (10mm) for optimized airflow velocity
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (MQB-specific, 30mm front fenders, 40mm rear) with carbon fiber overfenders and a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap (2080 series) on the OEM Edition 40 red accents, paired with a custom front splitter (APR GT300) and a carbon fiber rear diffuser (Seibon) with integrated dual 3.5" exhaust outlets (Remus Valvetronic system, non-resonated)

OEM+ lighting upgrades: Osram Night Breaker Laser H7/H11 bulbs (6,500K) for the headlights and LUX V4 LED fog lights, with a custom Euro-spec rear LED cluster (Hella dynamic turn signals) and a carbon fiber mirror cap set (VWR) in matte black with integrated LED puddle lights (Philips Ultinon Pro9000)

Interior: Recaro Sportster CS seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara/leatherette) with custom red stitching (Volkswagen Accessories thread #N9A), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede, red stitch) with a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage (Autopower 8-point bolt-in, T45 steel) painted in VW Tornado Red (LA5M) with matching Alcantara-wrapped A-pillars and headliner
